description: Sanitized, deterministic full-session OHLCV, research evidence, model drafts, usage, and independent expected tactical boundaries for the mandatory post-change TradersLink AI Read audit. Candle tuple order: timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume.

modelResponse.currentRead: AURX is constructive while the after-hours shelf holds, but continuation still needs acceptance through the session-high rejection area.

needsToHold.label: After-hours shelf
needsToHold.rationale: The postmarket consolidation held above this higher-low shelf.

cautionBelow.label: Premarket base
cautionBelow.rationale: A loss of the premarket base would weaken the opening range structure.

momentumFailure.label: Prior regular low
momentumFailure.rationale: A failed spike through the prior regular session low would break the higher low sequence.

mustClear.label: Session rejection zone
mustClear.rationale: Repeated regular session rejection near the session high makes acceptance necessary.

breakoutContinuation.label: Range-high continuation
breakoutContinuation.rationale: Acceptance above the range high opens the continuation path.

targets.label: First extension
targets.condition: Only after the postmarket range high holds as support.

targets.label: Daily extension
targets.condition: A sustained daily range breakout can expose this higher range.

downsideCheckpoints.label: Lower range support
downsideCheckpoints.condition: Exposed if the prior regular session shelf fails.

downsideCheckpoints.label: Outer daily support
downsideCheckpoints.condition: The next daily range low is in play after a failed spike.
